creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Adjust to use 5.12.4. Options Helpers

Here is port test clean, this is problem with RedPorts.

These files are installed here, and when i remove them from pkg-plist have leftovers:

tar: include/logg.h: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/liblogg.a: Cannot stat: No such file or directory


Used is %%OGG%% option which is default.

make pretty-print-config
+ALSA +DOCS -JACK +OGG EXAMPLES_DEMOS[ +EXAMPLES +DEMOS ]
